panels.title: Total Cost (Today)
panels.description: Total spend across all Claude Code sessions that started today. If this is climbing unexpectedly fast, check the Cost by Agent Type panel — a single Opus delegation or a runaway sidechain is usually the culprit.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime') = date('now', 'localtime')
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime') = date('now', 'localtime')

panels.title: Total Cost (All Time)
panels.description: Cumulative spend since metrics collection began. Use this as a baseline when estimating project budgets — compare against the Cost by Project panel to see which codebases consume the most.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS cost FROM agent_metrics
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS cost FROM agent_metrics

panels.title: Total Tokens (Today)
panels.description: Combined input and output tokens consumed today across all agents. A high token count relative to low cost suggests good cache utilization — check Cache Efficiency to confirm context is being reused rather than re-billed.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0) AS tokens FROM agent_metrics WHERE date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime') = date('now', 'localtime')
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0) AS tokens FROM agent_metrics WHERE date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime') = date('now', 'localtime')

panels.title: Total Tokens (All Time)
panels.description: Cumulative token volume since tracking began. Divide by Total Cost (All Time) to get an approximate effective cost-per-token — a rising cost-per-token over time suggests cache hit rates are degrading.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0) AS tokens FROM agent_metrics
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens), 0) AS tokens FROM agent_metrics

panels.title: Sessions Today
panels.description: Number of distinct Claude Code sessions started today. More sessions than expected may indicate frequent restarts due to errors or context overflows — check Error Rate by Agent Type if this number seems high.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS sessions FROM agent_metrics WHERE date(recorded_at, 'localtime') = date('now', 'localtime')
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS sessions FROM agent_metrics WHERE date(recorded_at, 'localtime') = date('now', 'localtime')

panels.title: Active Kanban Sessions
panels.description: Number of distinct kanban sessions with activity today. Each session represents a named work context — more than expected may indicate stale sessions accumulating rather than proper session hygiene.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT kanban_session) AS active FROM agent_metrics WHERE kanban_session != 'unknown' AND date(recorded_at, 'localtime') = date('now', 'localtime')
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT kanban_session) AS active FROM agent_metrics WHERE kanban_session != 'unknown' AND date(recorded_at, 'localtime') = date('now', 'localtime')

panels.title: Cost Over Time
panels.description: Daily spend trend across all Claude Code sessions. Spikes usually indicate large Opus delegations or sessions with many turns — check the Cost by Agent Type panel to identify the driver.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Cost by Model
panels.description: Total spend broken down by model family (haiku, sonnet, opus). If sonnet or haiku are unexpectedly high, routine tasks may be over-powered — use Agent x Model Usage to see which roles are driving each model's cost.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT model, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY model ORDER BY cost DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT model, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY model ORDER BY cost DESC

panels.title: Cost by Agent
panels.description: Total accumulated cost per agent role (e.g., swe-backend, scribe, staff-engineer). A role that costs far more than others is your primary cost driver — cross-reference with Turns by Agent Type to determine whether the cost is from many turns or expensive model choices.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT agent, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT agent, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Cost by Repo
panels.description: Total spend per git repository. A project that suddenly jumps in cost without a corresponding increase in throughput is worth investigating for inefficient delegation patterns.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT git_repo, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY git_repo ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT git_repo, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY git_repo ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Daily Cost Trend
panels.description: Daily spend trend over the selected time range. Use alongside Cost Over Time to spot patterns — weekday vs. weekend differences reveal whether Claude usage is concentrated in active work periods.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, model, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime'), model ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, model, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime'), model ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Cost by Kanban Session
panels.description: Cumulative spend per kanban session name (e.g., swift-falcon). If one session dwarfs the rest, inspect which agents drove the cost.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT kanban_session, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS sessions, SUM(total_turns) AS total_turns FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY kanban_session ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT kanban_session, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS sessions, SUM(total_turns) AS total_turns FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY kanban_session ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Token Usage Breakdown
panels.description: Input, output, and cache-read token volumes stacked by model family. A small cache-read segment relative to input means context is being invalidated — check if CLAUDE.md or skill files changed recently.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT model, SUM(input_tokens) AS input_tokens, SUM(output_tokens) AS output_tokens, SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS cache_read_tokens, SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS cache_write_tokens FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY model ORDER BY input_tokens DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT model, SUM(input_tokens) AS input_tokens, SUM(output_tokens) AS output_tokens, SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS cache_read_tokens, SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS cache_write_tokens FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY model ORDER BY input_tokens DESC

panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio Over Time
panels.description: Percentage of input tokens served from cache vs. fresh input, per day. Below 70% means context is being invalidated frequently — check if CLAUDE.md or skill files changed recently.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, CAST(SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens) + SUM(cache_read_tokens), 0) * 100 AS cache_pct FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, CAST(SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens) + SUM(cache_read_tokens), 0) * 100 AS cache_pct FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Tool Usage Heatmap
panels.description: Call frequency per tool, broken down by bash command. High call counts for any single tool indicate heavy usage patterns — cross-reference with Most Denied Tools to see if those same tools are also being blocked.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT tool_name, bash_command, SUM(call_count) AS total_calls FROM agent_tool_usage GROUP BY tool_name, bash_command ORDER BY total_calls DESC LIMIT 50
targets.queryText: SELECT tool_name, bash_command, SUM(call_count) AS total_calls FROM agent_tool_usage GROUP BY tool_name, bash_command ORDER BY total_calls DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Top Bash Commands
panels.description: Most-used bash commands by total call count across all agents. If a particular command dominates, it may indicate a bottleneck pattern or an opportunity to cache or batch that operation.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT bash_command || CASE WHEN bash_subcommand != '' THEN ' ' || bash_subcommand ELSE '' END AS command, SUM(call_count) AS total_calls FROM agent_tool_usage WHERE tool_name = 'Bash' AND bash_command != '' GROUP BY bash_command, bash_subcommand ORDER BY total_calls DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT bash_command || CASE WHEN bash_subcommand != '' THEN ' ' || bash_subcommand ELSE '' END AS command, SUM(call_count) AS total_calls FROM agent_tool_usage WHERE tool_name = 'Bash' AND bash_command != '' GROUP BY bash_command, bash_subcommand ORDER BY total_calls DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Agent Activity Over Time
panels.description: Daily count of agent runs per agent type. A declining trend for a particular agent type may signal that delegation to that specialist is being reduced, intentionally or not.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS agent_runs FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS agent_runs FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Sessions Per Day
panels.description: Number of distinct Claude Code sessions each day. Consistent gaps indicate downtime; sudden spikes may reflect large parallel workloads.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS sessions FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS sessions FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Turns Per Agent
panels.description: Total API round-trips accumulated per agent role. A role with high turns AND high cost is worth examining in the Model Optimization section to see if model selection could be optimized.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT agent, SUM(total_turns) AS total_turns FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent ORDER BY total_turns DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT agent, SUM(total_turns) AS total_turns FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent ORDER BY total_turns DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Permission Denials Over Time
panels.description: Daily count of permission denials. Rising denials indicate agents attempting actions outside their allowed scope — check the Permission Denials by Tool panel to identify which tools are being blocked.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(denied_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS denials FROM permission_denials WHERE denied_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND denied_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', denied_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(denied_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS denials FROM permission_denials WHERE denied_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND denied_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', denied_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Permission Denials by Tool
panels.description: Tools that were blocked by the permission system, ranked by denial count. Repeated denials for the same tool indicate an agent is attempting actions it is not authorized for — either the task prompt needs adjustment or the permission configuration needs updating.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT tool_name, COUNT(*) AS denial_count FROM permission_denials GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY denial_count DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT tool_name, COUNT(*) AS denial_count FROM permission_denials GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY denial_count DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Avg Turn Latency by Agent
panels.description: Average turn-to-response latency in seconds per agent role. If haiku shows similar latency to sonnet, the speed advantage of the cheaper model is being lost — check token counts per turn.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT agent, SUM(avg_turn_latency_seconds * total_turns) / NULLIF(SUM(total_turns), 0) AS avg_latency FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent ORDER BY avg_latency DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT agent, SUM(avg_turn_latency_seconds * total_turns) / NULLIF(SUM(total_turns), 0) AS avg_latency FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent ORDER BY avg_latency DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: p95 Turn Count by Role
panels.description: Turn count statistics per agent role, including p95 approximation using NTILE(20). If p95 is much higher than the average, a small number of sessions are running very long — investigate the top expensive sessions.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT agent, total_turns, NTILE(20) OVER (PARTITION BY agent ORDER BY total_turns) AS ntile FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch'))) SELECT agent, MIN(total_turns) AS min_turns, MAX(total_turns) AS max_turns, ROUND(AVG(total_turns), 1) AS avg_turns, MAX(CASE WHEN ntile = 19 THEN total_turns END) AS p95_turns, COUNT(*) AS sample_size FROM ranked GROUP BY agent ORDER BY avg_turns DESC
targets.queryText: WITH ranked AS (SELECT agent, total_turns, NTILE(20) OVER (PARTITION BY agent ORDER BY total_turns) AS ntile FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch'))) SELECT agent, MIN(total_turns) AS min_turns, MAX(total_turns) AS max_turns, ROUND(AVG(total_turns), 1) AS avg_turns, MAX(CASE WHEN ntile = 19 THEN total_turns END) AS p95_turns, COUNT(*) AS sample_size FROM ranked GROUP BY agent ORDER BY avg_turns DESC

panels.title: Cost per Turn by Model
panels.description: Average dollar cost per API turn, broken down by model family. High cost per turn for haiku suggests those sessions are using unexpectedly large context windows.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT model, SUM(cost_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(total_turns), 0) AS cost_per_turn FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY model ORDER BY cost_per_turn DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT model, SUM(cost_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(total_turns), 0) AS cost_per_turn FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY model ORDER BY cost_per_turn DESC

panels.title: Agent Run Duration
panels.description: Distribution of agent run durations in minutes (last_seen_at minus first_seen_at). The bulk of the distribution shows typical agent duration; outliers on the right indicate agents working on large or complex tasks.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN duration_minutes < 5 THEN '<5m' WHEN duration_minutes < 15 THEN '5-15m' WHEN duration_minutes < 30 THEN '15-30m' WHEN duration_minutes < 60 THEN '30-60m' WHEN duration_minutes < 120 THEN '1-2h' ELSE '>2h' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT (julianday(last_seen_at) - julianday(first_seen_at)) * 1440 AS duration_minutes FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND last_seen_at IS NOT NULL AND first_seen_at IS NOT NULL AND last_seen_at > first_seen_at) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY MIN(duration_minutes)
targets.queryText: SELECT CASE WHEN duration_minutes < 5 THEN '<5m' WHEN duration_minutes < 15 THEN '5-15m' WHEN duration_minutes < 30 THEN '15-30m' WHEN duration_minutes < 60 THEN '30-60m' WHEN duration_minutes < 120 THEN '1-2h' ELSE '>2h' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT (julianday(last_seen_at) - julianday(first_seen_at)) * 1440 AS duration_minutes FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND last_seen_at IS NOT NULL AND first_seen_at IS NOT NULL AND last_seen_at > first_seen_at) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY MIN(duration_minutes)

panels.title: Model Distribution by Agent
panels.description: Cross-reference of agent types with model families. Shows call frequency and cost patterns to identify expensive or over-engineered model selections.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT agent, model, COUNT(*) AS sessions, SUM(total_turns) AS total_turns, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent, model ORDER BY total_cost DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT agent, model, COUNT(*) AS sessions, SUM(total_turns) AS total_turns, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent, model ORDER BY total_cost DESC

panels.title: Haiku vs Sonnet vs Opus Ratio
panels.description: Proportion of sessions using each model family. A high haiku ratio on high-complexity agent types suggests under-powered model selection; a high opus ratio on routine tasks is cost-inefficient.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS session_count FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY model ORDER BY session_count DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS session_count FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY model ORDER BY session_count DESC

panels.title: Cost Efficiency by Model
panels.description: Cost per turn broken down by model (cost_usd / total_turns). A model with disproportionately high cost-per-turn may be handling tasks with unusually large context windows.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT model, SUM(cost_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(total_turns), 0) AS cost_per_turn, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY model ORDER BY cost_per_turn DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT model, SUM(cost_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(total_turns), 0) AS cost_per_turn, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY model ORDER BY cost_per_turn DESC

panels.title: Cards Completed Per Day
panels.description: Daily card completion velocity. A rising trend means more work is flowing through to done; gaps indicate days with no completions.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS cards_done FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS cards_done FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Redo Rate
panels.description: Ratio of redo events to done events across all time. A high redo rate signals quality issues — cards are frequently sent back for rework before acceptance.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'redo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'done' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100 AS redo_rate FROM kanban_card_events
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'redo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'done' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100 AS redo_rate FROM kanban_card_events

panels.title: Card Cycle Time
panels.description: Time from first 'doing' event to 'done' event per card. Cards with very long cycle times may indicate tasks that are too large or agents that got stuck.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT kce_done.card_number, kce_done.kanban_session, ROUND((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 1440, 1) AS cycle_minutes, kce_done.agent, kce_done.recorded_at AS completed_at FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'doing' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' ORDER BY cycle_minutes DESC LIMIT 50
targets.queryText: SELECT kce_done.card_number, kce_done.kanban_session, ROUND((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 1440, 1) AS cycle_minutes, kce_done.agent, kce_done.recorded_at AS completed_at FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'doing' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' ORDER BY cycle_minutes DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Cards by Agent
panels.description: Total card completions broken down by agent persona. Shows workload distribution — which agents are carrying the most throughput.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT agent, COUNT(*) AS cards_done FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent ORDER BY cards_done DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT agent, COUNT(*) AS cards_done FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent ORDER BY cards_done DESC

panels.title: Lead Time Distribution
panels.description: Distribution of how many hours cards take from first 'doing' to 'done'. The bulk of the distribution shows the typical card duration; outliers on the right indicate cards that got stuck or were exceptionally complex.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 24, 2) AS lead_time_hours FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'doing' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' AND kce_start.recorded_at IS NOT NULL
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 24, 2) AS lead_time_hours FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'doing' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' AND kce_start.recorded_at IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Average Lead Time by Agent
panels.description: Average card completion time (in minutes) per agent persona. Longer bars indicate agents working on higher-complexity cards or models that require more elapsed time.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT kce_done.agent, ROUND(AVG((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 1440), 1) AS avg_lead_minutes FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'doing' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' GROUP BY kce_done.agent ORDER BY avg_lead_minutes DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT kce_done.agent, ROUND(AVG((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 1440), 1) AS avg_lead_minutes FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'doing' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' GROUP BY kce_done.agent ORDER BY avg_lead_minutes DESC

panels.title: Done vs Redo Events Over Time
panels.description: Daily count of 'done' events vs 'redo' events. A declining redo line alongside a stable or rising done line means quality is improving — fewer cards are being sent back for rework.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'done' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS done_count, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'redo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS redo_count FROM kanban_card_events WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'done' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS done_count, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'redo' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS redo_count FROM kanban_card_events WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Card Flow
panels.description: Recent cards with their events, showing the flow from creation through to completion. Cards with many redo events before done indicate quality issues or under-specified task definitions.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT card_number, kanban_session, event_type, agent, model, recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 100
targets.queryText: SELECT card_number, kanban_session, event_type, agent, model, recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 100
